checkForUpdatesDesc: Check if a newer version of Ax-Fabric is available.
checkForBackendUpdatesDesc: Check if a newer version of the Llamacpp backend is available.
noBackendUpdateAvailable: You're running the latest Llamacpp version
backendUpdateError: Failed to check for Llamacpp updates
failedToRelocateDataFolderDesc: Failed to relocate data folder. Please try again.
factoryResetDesc: This will reset all app settings to their defaults. This can't be undone. We only recommend this if the app is corrupted.
documentationDesc: Learn how to use Ax-Fabric and explore its features.
releaseNotesDesc: See what's new in the latest version of Ax-Fabric.
discordDesc: Join our community for support and discussions.
reportAnIssueDesc: Found a bug? Help us out by filing an issue on GitHub.
creditsDesc1: 👋 Ax-Fabric is built with ❤️ by the Ax-Fabric team.
creditsDesc2: Special thanks to our open-source dependencies—especially Tauri—and to our amazing AI community.

dataFolder.appDataDesc: Default location for messages and other user data.
dataFolder.appLogsDesc: View detailed logs of the App.

others.spellCheckDesc: Enable spell check for your threads.
others.resetFactoryDesc: Restore application to its initial state, erasing all models and chat history. This action is irreversible and recommended only if the application is corrupted.

interface.title: Interface
interface.windowBackgroundDesc: Set the app window's background color.
interface.appMainViewDesc: Set the main content area's background color.
interface.primaryDesc: Set the primary color for interface accents.
interface.accentDesc: Select the accent color used across the UI.
interface.destructiveDesc: Set the highlight color for destructive actions.
interface.resetToDefaultDesc: Reset all interface settings to default.
interface.resetInterfaceSuccessDesc: All interface settings have been restored to default.
interface.threadScrollDesc: Choose how the chat viewport should react when new messages arrive.
interface.threadScrollFlowHint: Keeps the viewport anchored to the latest message you send.
interface.threadScrollStickyHint: Automatically follows along as replies stream in real time.
interface.tokenCounterCompactDesc: Show token counter inside chat input. When disabled, token counter appears below the input.
interface.showLineNumbersDesc: Display line numbers in code blocks.
interface.resetCodeBlockStyleDesc: Reset code block style to default.
interface.resetCodeBlockSuccessDesc: Code block style has been restored to default.

hardware.name: Name
hardware.enableVulkanDesc: Use Vulkan API for GPU acceleration. Do not enable Vulkan if you have an NVIDIA GPU as it may cause compatibility issues.
hardware.checkForBackendUpdatesDesc: Check if a newer version of the llama.cpp inference engine is available.
hardware.noEngineUpdateAvailable: You're running the latest llama.cpp version
hardware.installFromFileDesc: Manually install a llama.cpp backend from a downloaded .tar.gz or .zip file.

httpsProxy.proxyUrlDesc: The URL and port of your proxy server.
httpsProxy.authenticationDesc: Credentials for the proxy server, if required.
httpsProxy.noProxyDesc: A comma-separated list of hosts to bypass the proxy.
httpsProxy.ignoreSslDesc: Allow self-signed or unverified certificates. This may be required for some proxies but reduces security. Only enable if you trust your proxy.
httpsProxy.proxySslDesc: Validate the SSL certificate when connecting to the proxy.
httpsProxy.proxyHostSslDesc: Validate the SSL certificate of the proxy's host.
httpsProxy.peerSslDesc: Validate the SSL certificates of peer connections.
httpsProxy.hostSslDesc: Validate the SSL certificates of destination hosts.

localApiServer.title: Local API Server
localApiServer.serverLogsDesc: View detailed logs of the local API server.
localApiServer.runOnStartupDesc: Automatically start the Local API Server when the application launches.
localApiServer.serverPortDesc: Port number for the API server.
localApiServer.apiKeyDesc: Authenticate requests with an API key.
localApiServer.trustedHostsDesc: Hosts allowed to access the server, separated by commas.
localApiServer.corsDesc: Allow cross-origin requests to the API server.
localApiServer.verboseLogsDesc: Enable detailed server logs for debugging.
localApiServer.proxyTimeoutDesc: Time to wait for a response from the local model, seconds.

privacy.helpUsImproveDesc: To help us improve Ax-Fabric, you can share anonymous data like feature usage and user counts. We never collect your chats or personal information.
privacy.privacyPolicy: You have full control over your data. Learn more in our Privacy Policy.
privacy.analyticsDesc: To improve Ax-Fabric, we need to understand how it's used—but only with your help. You can change this setting anytime.
privacy.privacyPromises: Your choice here won't change our core privacy promises:
privacy.promise1: Your conversations stay private and on your device
privacy.promise2: We never collect your personal information or chat content
privacy.promise3: All data sharing is anonymous and aggregated
privacy.promise4: You can opt out anytime without losing functionality
privacy.promise5: We're transparent about what we collect and why

general.couldNotRelocateToRoot: Cannot relocate data folder to root directory. Please choose another location.
general.couldNotResetRootDirectory: Cannot reset data folder when it's set to a root directory. Please delete the data folder manually.
general.failedToRelocateDataFolderDesc: Failed to relocate data folder. Please try again.
general.checkForUpdatesDesc: Check if a newer version of Ax-Fabric is available.
general.factoryResetDesc: This will reset all app settings to their defaults. This can't be undone. We only recommend this if the app is corrupted.
general.huggingfaceTokenDesc: Your HuggingFace API token for accessing models.
general.documentationDesc: Learn how to use Ax-Fabric and explore its features.
general.releaseNotesDesc: See what's new in the latest version of Ax-Fabric.
general.discordDesc: Join our community for support and discussions.
general.reportAnIssueDesc: Found a bug? Help us out by filing an issue on GitHub.
general.creditsDesc1: 👋 Ax-Fabric is built with ❤️ by the Ax-Fabric team.
general.creditsDesc2: Special thanks to our open-source dependencies—especially Tauri—and to our amazing AI community.

attachments.subtitle: Configure document attachments, size limits, and retrieval behavior.
attachments.enableDesc: Allow uploading and indexing documents for retrieval.
attachments.parseModeDesc: Choose how parsed documents are added to conversations.
attachments.autoInlineThresholdDesc: Fraction of the model context used as the cutoff for inlining parsed files on local models.
attachments.maxFileDesc: Maximum size per file. Enforced at upload and processing time.
attachments.thresholdDesc: Minimum similarity score (0-1). Only used for linear cosine search, not ANN.
attachments.searchModeDesc: Choose between sqlite-vec ANN, linear cosine, or auto.
attachments.chunkSizeDesc: Approximate max characters per chunk for embeddings.

changeDataFolder.title: Change Data Folder Location
changeDataFolder.description: Are you sure you want to change the data folder location? This will move all your data to the new location and restart the application.

engineSettings.title: Engine Settings
engineSettings.notAvailable: llama.cpp engine is not loaded. Start the application to initialize the engine.
engineSettings.versionBackendDesc: Select which llama.cpp version and hardware backend to use.
engineSettings.llamacppEnvDesc: Custom environment variables passed to the llama.cpp server (e.g. GGML_VK_VISIBLE_DEVICES=0,1).
engineSettings.autoUpdateEngineDesc: Automatically download newer llama.cpp versions when available.
engineSettings.autoUnloadDesc: Automatically unload the current model when loading a new one to free memory.
engineSettings.timeoutDesc: Maximum time to wait for a model to load before giving up.
engineSettings.fitDesc: Automatically adjust context size and batch size to fit within available memory.
engineSettings.fitTargetDesc: Target memory headroom per device when auto-fitting.
engineSettings.fitCtxDesc: Minimum context window size when auto-fitting is enabled.
engineSettings.threadsDesc: Number of CPU threads for token generation. -1 = use all logical cores.
engineSettings.threadsBatchDesc: CPU threads for prompt processing. -1 = same as threads.
engineSettings.nPredictDesc: Maximum tokens to generate per request. -1 = unlimited.
engineSettings.ubatchSizeDesc: Physical batch size for generation. Smaller values use less memory.
engineSettings.deviceDesc: Comma-separated GPU device IDs for offloading (e.g. CUDA0,CUDA1). Leave empty for auto.
engineSettings.splitModeDesc: How to distribute layers across multiple GPUs.
engineSettings.nGpuLayersDesc: Number of model layers to offload to GPU. 0 = CPU only, -1 = all.
engineSettings.offloadMmprojDesc: Offload the vision projector (mmproj) to GPU for faster multimodal inference.
engineSettings.cpuMoeDesc: Use CPU for Mixture-of-Experts routing layers to reduce GPU memory pressure.
engineSettings.nCpuMoeDesc: Number of expert layers to run on CPU when CPU MoE is enabled.
engineSettings.flashAttnDesc: Enable Flash Attention for faster inference and lower memory usage.
engineSettings.contBatchingDesc: Allow multiple concurrent inference requests to share the same model session.
engineSettings.ctxShiftDesc: Slide the context window when the input exceeds the context length.
engineSettings.cacheTypeKDesc: Precision for attention key vectors. Lower precision saves memory.
engineSettings.cacheTypeVDesc: Precision for attention value vectors. Requires Flash Attention = on.
engineSettings.defragTholdDesc: Trigger KV cache defragmentation when fragmentation exceeds this ratio.
engineSettings.ropeScalingDesc: Context extension method for models with limited training context.
engineSettings.ropeScaleDesc: Context length multiplier for linear RoPE scaling.
engineSettings.ropeFreqBaseDesc: Override the model's RoPE base frequency (0 = use model default).
engineSettings.mirostatLrDesc: How quickly Mirostat adapts to maintain target perplexity.
engineSettings.mirostatEntDesc: Target perplexity value. Higher = more creative, lower = more focused.
engineSettings.grammarFileDesc: Path to a BNF grammar file for constrained text generation.
engineSettings.jsonSchemaFileDesc: Path to a JSON schema file for structured JSON output.
engineSettings.noMmapDesc: Load the model fully into RAM instead of memory-mapping. Slower load, reduces page faults.
engineSettings.mlockDesc: Prevent the model from being swapped to disk.
engineSettings.noKvOffloadDesc: Keep the KV cache on the same device as the model layers, not offloaded to GPU.
engineSettings.ctxSizeDesc: Context window size (0 = use model default). Used when Auto Memory Fit is disabled.

errors.binaryNotFound: Engine binary not found. Please re-download the backend in Engine Settings.
errors.modelFileNotFound: Model file not found. Please re-import the model.
errors.modelLoadFailed: Failed to load model. Check logs for details.
errors.modelLoadTimedOut: Model took too long to load. Try increasing the timeout in Engine Settings.
errors.outOfMemory: Not enough memory to load this model. Try reducing GPU layers or context size.
errors.modelArchNotSupported: This model architecture is not supported by the current backend.
errors.multimodalProjectorLoadFailed: Failed to load vision projector. Check that mmproj.gguf is valid.
errors.deviceListParseFailed: Could not detect GPU devices. Falling back to CPU.
errors.invalidArgument: Invalid model configuration. Check Engine Settings.
errors.contextExceeded: Input exceeds context window. Reduce message history or increase context size.
errors.processCrashed: Model process crashed. Please reload the model.
errors.sha256Mismatch: Downloaded file is corrupted. Please try again.
errors.modelValidationFailed: Model validation failed — the file may be corrupted.
